name: shopper
description: Logiciel de bureau, gestion de caisse

scripts.electron: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('node_modules/better-sqlite3/build', { recursive: true, force: true });" && electron-builder install-app-deps && electron .
scripts.electron:dev: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('node_modules/better-sqlite3/build', { recursive: true, force: true });" && electron-builder install-app-deps && concurrently -k "npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.test: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('node_modules/better-sqlite3/build', { recursive: true, force: true });" && npm run install --prefix node_modules/better-sqlite3 && vitest run

author: Dragan Ribes
